roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION UPDATED PER AB1950, PROBATION EXPIRED 06/20/2020
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 365 D/CTS:44/WS/DNACOMP/IND/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CTORD:THAT DEFENDANT IS PROHIBITED FROM OWNING, POSSESSING OR OTHERWISE HAVING UNDER HIS CARE, CUSTODY OR CONTROL ANY DANGEROUS OR DEADLY WEAPON, AMMUNITIONOR AMMUNITION CLIPS, FOR THE REMAINDER OF HIS LIFE,/CTORD:AS FURTHER CONDITIONS OF DEFENDANT'S PROBATION, AT THE TIME OF DEFENDANT RELEASE FROM JAIL,DEFENDANT SHALL (1) BE FITTED WITH AN ELECTRONIC GPS MONITORING DEVICE AND; (2) BE PLACED ON 6 MONTHS OF HOME DETENTION THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM; AND, (3) MUST BE FULLY COMPLIANT WITH ACURFEW BEGINNING AT 6PM UNTIL 7AM, SEVEN DAYS PER WEEK,/654:1 AND 2/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:MOTION TO DETAINWITHOUT BAIL IS MOOT,/X: COURT NOTES THIS IS AN OPEN NEGOTIATED PLEA,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1, 2,AND 3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ARBUCKLE/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 5Y; PJ 1YEAR CTS TO BE DETERMINED BY APD AT SENTENCING;SERVE 6 MONTHS HOME DETENTION AND EM WITH CONDITION OF  CURFEW, MONDAY - SUNDAY 6 PM TO 7 AM; WS;VF $300/X:DNACOMP; PC; PSR; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA; FINE; BKFEE/X:THE DEFENDANT ADMITS ALLEGATION OF PRIOR(S) ON 03-06-13, 04-20-17, AND 09-15-09 ALL INTHE COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO; THE DEFENDANT ALSO ADMITS ALLEGATION OF PRIORON 03-06-13 PURSUANT TO PC 667,5(B),/X:VICTIM RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINEDBY APD/TWS/PRES: 06-21-18 IN DEPARTMENT 21/PPRFCUST/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:05-25-18/987,2/BAIL:100,000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
